{{Infobox artifact
| name = Kelarac’s mark
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] can cast his mind through [[Kelarac’s mark]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] uses [[Kelarac]]'s mark on his arm to send [[Intent]] into the ship.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Kelarac’s mark]] is something [[Calder]] must focus through to stay conscious.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] braces his [[Intent]] through [[Kelarac’s mark]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
